::: {.content-hidden unless-meta="has-math"}

::: {.hidden}

<!-- Groundwork -->
$$
\gdef\sub#1{_{\mathrm{#1}}}
\gdef\unit#1{\mathrm{#1}}
$$
<!-- Physical units -->
$$
\gdef\Celsius{\unit{°C}}
\gdef\Gram{\unit{g}}
\gdef\Joule{\unit{J}}
\gdef\Kelvin{\unit{K}}
\gdef\Kilogram{\unit{kg}}
\gdef\Liter{\unit{L}}
\gdef\Milliliter{\unit{mL}}
\gdef\Meter{\unit{m}}
\gdef\Mole{\unit{mol}}
\gdef\Newton{\unit{N}}
\gdef\Pascal{\unit{Pa}}
$$
<!-- Prefixed units -->
$$
\gdef\KiloJoule{\unit{k}\Joule}
$$
<!-- Exponentiated units -->
$$
\gdef\SquareMeter{\Meter^2}
\gdef\CubicMeter{\Meter^3}
$$
<!-- Combined physical units -->
$$
\gdef\CubicMeterPerMole{\frac{\CubicMeter}{\Mole}}
\gdef\NewtonPerKilogram{\frac{\Newton}{\Kilogram}}
\gdef\JoulePerMole{\frac{\Joule}{\Mole}}
\gdef\JoulePerKilogram{\frac{\Joule}{\Kilogram}}
\gdef\JoulePerKelvin{\frac{\Joule}{\Kelvin}}
\gdef\JoulePerKilogramPerKelvin{\frac{\Joule}{\Kilogram\,\Kelvin}}
\gdef\JoulePerMolePerKelvin{\frac{\Joule}{\Mole\,\Kelvin}}
\gdef\KiloJoulePerKilogram{\frac{\KiloJoule}{\Kilogram}}
\gdef\KiloJoulePerMole{\frac{\KiloJoule}{\Mole}}
\gdef\KiloJoulePerGram{\frac{\KiloJoule}{\Gram}}
\gdef\KiloJoulePerKelvin{\frac{\KiloJoule}{\Kelvin}}
\gdef\KiloJoulePerKilogramPerKelvin{\frac{\KiloJoule}{\Kilogram\,\Kelvin}}
\gdef\KiloJoulePerMolePerKelvin{\frac{\KiloJoule}{\Mole\,\Kelvin}}
$$

:::

:::
